fulltext: Rahul P +91 8431053364 — rahuljobsearchh@gmail.com LinkedIn — GitHub — Portfolio Professional Summary Aspiring Data Analyst with strong foundations in SQL, Python, and data visualization. Experienced in cleaning, transforming, and analyzing structured datasets to generate actionable business insights. Skilled in building dashboards and applying analytical thinking to solve real-world problems. Technical Skills Programming:Python, SQL Data T ools:Excel, Power BI, Tableau Libraries:Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib Databases:MySQL, PostgreSQL (Supabase) Concepts:Data Cleaning, EDA, Data Visualization, ETL Basics, KPI Design Data Projects Sales Performance Analysis (Excel) •Cleaned and analyzed 10,000+ rows of sales data using advanced Excel formulas and Pivot Tables. •Built an interactive dashboard to track monthly revenue, product performance, and regional trends. •Identified key sales patterns that improved business reporting clarity. Business Insights Dashboard (Power BI) •Transformed raw datasets using Power Query for structured analysis. •Designed KPI-focused dashboards with slicers and dynamic visualizations. •Analyzed time-based and region-wise performance to highlight growth opportunities. SQL Data Analysis •Wrote optimized SQL queries including JOINs, GROUP BY, aggregations, and subqueries. •Extracted insights from relational datasets to support data-driven decisions. Experience Data Analyst Intern -EV AP SolarsClean Energy Domain •Analyzed structured datasets to extract insights related to operational performance. •Cleaned and transformed raw data to improve reporting accuracy and consistency. •Built dashboards and reports to support data-driven decision making. •Collaborated with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into analytical solutions. Education Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA)2023 – 2026 The National College, Jayanagar CGPA: 8.9 Certifications •Deloitte Data Analyst Virtual Experience – Forage •Google AI Essentials – Coursera
